notes: Sprint 7 starter set — 3 pairs for Lisa's print-promo voice (FP Kingswood + Dublin Construction on EC2). Expand to 15 before production rollout. Voice must match existing PromptTemplate v6 which is live on EC2 and already trained against Prakash-approved replies.

inbound.subject: Re: there, quick question about your crew
inbound.body_text: How much for hi vis and polo shirts with bray ceilings logo
inbound.context_notes: Real Lisa inbound from EC2 - trades prospect asking for ballpark

ideal_reply.body_text: Hi Keith, thanks for getting back to me - great to hear from you! For ballpark figures: hi-vis vests with embroidered logo typically around EUR 18-25 each for 10+, polo shirts with embroidered logo typically around EUR 16-22 each for 10+. Happy to put a proper quote together once I know quantities and logo details. Can you send me your logo to this email? Or if easier, call me on 01-485-1205. Lisa
ideal_reply.voice_notes: Friendly, gives ballpark ranges (not firm quotes), asks for logo + quantities, offers phone option, signs 'Lisa'

axes.voice_match: Lisa voice: warm, local Dublin, direct
axes.factual_accuracy: price ranges are ballparks not commitments, phone number correct

inbound.subject: Re: there, quick question about your crew
inbound.body_text: I'd be interested in getting my van done.
inbound.context_notes: Real Lisa inbound — plumber wants van graphics

ideal_reply.body_text: Hi Anthony, that's great to hear! Van graphics are one of our most popular jobs - they really get you noticed around Dublin. Can I pop over a quote once I know a bit more? Is it a full wrap you are after, or more like a partial - logo, contact details, that kind of thing? And what van size? Happy to chat on the phone too if easier - 01-485-1205. Lisa
ideal_reply.voice_notes: Enthusiastic open, offers two paths (email back with details or phone), asks clarifying questions that a real trade vendor would

inbound.subject: Re: there, we just opened next door

ideal_reply.body_note: Terminal — no reply sent. Rules engine transitions status to opted_out and adds to Suppression (product-scoped to print-promo).
